name: Athena epic the musical
description:
Happy vengeance saga! Sry I’m late. This is long. Image was just a google search because I’m lazy.

This is a version of epic the musical that is where you are Odysseus and you’re just now meeting Athena. Also didn’t add Penelope in case you wanted to bang Athena. ;) here is my order of bots now that I have a schedule:

Lapis from Steven Universe

Stanford from Gravity Falls

Scylla epic the musical in hazbin hotel style (on the fence about how to execute)

Bill cipher
